appId.label: GitHub App ID
appId.help: Numeric App ID from your GitHub App settings page. Fallback: GITHUB_APP_ID env var.

privateKey.label: GitHub App Private Key (PEM)
privateKey.help: RSA private key generated in your GitHub App settings. Paste the full PEM contents. Fallback: GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY env var.

installationId.label: Installation ID
installationId.help: Installation ID for the org/user where the app is installed. Find it in the GitHub App installation URL or via API. Fallback: GITHUB_APP_INSTALLATION_ID env var.

defaultOwner.label: Default Owner
defaultOwner.help: Default GitHub org or username for issue creation (e.g. PotLock).

defaultRepo.label: Default Repository
defaultRepo.help: Default repo name (without owner) for issue creation (e.g. reply-marketing).
